# UISU SPACE

> The digital hub of the University of Ibadan Students' Union — past questions, CGPA & cut-off mark calculators, AI study tools, lost & found, clubs and marketplace for UI students.

UISU SPACE preserves 75+ years of University of Ibadan student union history and offers day-to-day tools for current UI students: an academic resource bank, AI-powered study companions, community boards, event calendars, and gazette journalism.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of UISU SPACE for University of Ibadan students.
- [Governance](/governance): Structure of the UI Students' Union (Executive, SRC, Judicial).
- [Current Leaders](/current-leaders): Serving UISU executives and legislators.
- [Past Leaders](/past-leaders): Hall of Fame — past UISU presidents since 1948.
- [History](/history): The story of UISU, the first student union in Nigeria.
- [Constitution](/constitution): Official UISU constitution.
- [Elections](/elections): UISU election calendar and blockchain voting.
- [Communities](/communities): Clubs and societies at the University of Ibadan.
- [Events](/events): Campus events calendar.
- [Announcements](/announcements): Official union news and updates.
- [Halls of Residence](/halls): The nine UI halls and their student governments.
- [Campus Map](/campus-map): Interactive map of the University of Ibadan.
- [Documents Library](/documents): Archived UISU documents and records.
- [Inks Vault](/inks-vault): Student literary works and poetry.
- [Gazette](/gazette): UISU student journalism and long-form articles.
- [Lost & Found](/lost-found): Report and recover lost items on campus.
- [Confessions](/confessions): Anonymous student confessions board.
- [Polls](/polls): Community polls.
- [Complaints](/complaints): Public feedback channel.

## Resources

- [Resources Hub](/resources): All student tools in one place.
- [Past Questions](/resources/past-questions): University of Ibadan past questions bank with AI solutions.
- [CGPA Calculator](/resources/gpa-calculator): University of Ibadan CGPA calculator.
- [AI Study Buddy](/resources/study-buddy): AI study companion for UI students.
- [AI Quiz](/resources/ai-quiz): Generate quizzes from your notes.
- [Flashcards](/resources/flashcards): AI-generated flashcards.
- [Quizlets](/resources/quizlets): Shareable quiz sets.
- [Student Mart](/resources/student-mart): Campus marketplace and classifieds.
- [Academic Planner](/resources/academic-planner): Plan your semester.
- [Academic Calendar](/resources/academic-calendar): UI academic calendar.
- [Budget Tracker](/resources/budget-tracker): Track student finances.

## Learning

- [Tutorials](/tutorials): Peer-led tutorials and study material.

## Optional

- [Newsletter](/newsletter): Subscribe to UISU updates.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we handle your data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Terms for using UISU SPACE.
- [Sitemap](/sitemap): Browsable list of all pages.
